questionHtml: Outline the relationship between Zooxanthellae and reef-building coral reef species.
markschemeHtml:
a. a symbiotic/mutualistic relationship ✔

b. Zooxanthellae obtain shelter/habitat/exposure to light ✔

c. coral obtains energy/food through photosynthesis of the Zooxanthellae ✔

meta.title: Outline the relationship between Zooxanthellae and reef-building coral reef species.
breadcrumbLabels: C4.1.12. Mutualism as an interspecific relationship that benefits both species
